Id1.text: Hypermarcas, the parent group of Mantecorp, was founded on January 1, 2001 in São Paulo.

Id2.text: Hypermarcas was founded on January 1, 2001, is located in Sao Paulo and has a subsidiary called Mantecorp.

Id3.text: Mantecorp is a subsidiary of Hypermarcas that was founded on 1-1-2001 and is located in Sao Paulo.
